suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add instruction: When content fundamentally changes (e.g., replacing all sections with new topic content), review and update the concepts, instructions, examples, and assessmentItems metadata to reflect the new content. Simply preserving old metadata that references the previous topic (e.g., keeping string-instruction concepts for Memory Hierarchy content) creates semantic misalignment that could affect downstream assessment and remediation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature extract-l8-memory-hierarchy preserved legacy string-instruction concepts/instructions in section and lecture-level metadata when replacing String Operations content with Memory Hierarchy content.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that npm run test is not defined in this project. Workers should not attempt npm run test and should rely on npm run validate:content, npm run lint, and npm run build for validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both course-map-fix and pdf-extraction milestones encountered 'npm error Missing script: test'. The project only defines validate:content, lint, build, dev, and preview scripts.
